.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Updated the Apache License URL from HTTP to HTTPS for security compliance.
Reordered import statements to follow standard Java conventions (java.io before java.net).
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved java.io.* import before java.net.* import

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted string concatenation for DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_URL to improve readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Combined multi-line string concatenation into a single line

.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.general_idea: Reformatted constant declarations to place the value on the same line as the variable name.
Added spaces after 'if' keywords to comply with standard Java coding style.
Reformatted the anonymous Authenticator class instantiation for better indentation and readability.
.mvn/wrapper/MavenWrapperDownloader.java.human_impl: Moved new Authenticator() instantiation to a new line with indented body

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the version string in the generated annotation comment to reflect the current JHipster version.
Convert multi-line string concatenation to Java 13+ text blocks for improved readability and maintainability.
Add CRLFLogConverter marker to log statements to prevent log injection vulnerabilities or formatting issues.
Modify active profile logging to display default profiles when no active profiles are explicitly set, providing more accurate runtime information.
Replace escaped single quotes with literal single quotes in the log message string to fix formatting or encoding issues.
Restrict the AsyncConfiguration bean to non-test profiles to prevent conflicts with test-specific configurations.
Update single-element annotation attribute to use explicit array syntax for consistency with modern Java style guides.
Remove the ProblemModule bean and its import as it is no longer needed or compatible in the updated configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.ProblemModule; and the problemModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Remove the ConstraintViolationProblemModule bean and its import as it is no longer needed or compatible in the updated configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import org.zalando.problem.violations.ConstraintViolationProblemModule; and the constraintViolationProblemModule() bean definition.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Add a new SpaWebFilter to handle Single Page Application routing requirements in the security filter chain.
Add a new CookieCsrfFilter to handle CSRF token management via cookies in the security filter chain.
Remove custom AjaxAuthenticationSuccessHandler, AjaxAuthenticationFailureHandler, and AjaxLogoutSuccessHandler beans in favor of standard HTTP status code responses.
Remove the dependency on SecurityProblemSupport for exception handling, replacing it with standard HttpStatusEntryPoint.
Update Content Security Policy configuration to use the new lambda-based API and read policy directives from JHipsterProperties.
Update frame options configuration to use the new lambda-based API and change from deny to sameOrigin.
Add explicit authorization rule for /v3/api-docs/** endpoints requiring ADMIN authority.
Add explicit permitAll rules for various static resource extensions like .js, .map, .css, .ico, .png, .svg, .webapp.
Consolidate static resource locations by removing the specific app subdirectory in favor of the root static directory.
Update resource path patterns to explicitly match file extensions and adjust path wildcards for static assets.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Replaced "/app/*", "/content/*", "/i18n/*" with explicit extensions like "/*.js", "/*.css" and adjusted wildcards.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to simplify casting logic.
Remove try-catch for UnsupportedEncodingException because StandardCharsets.UTF_8 is always supported in modern Java.
Update CORS configuration check to include allowedOriginPatterns, which is required for wildcard origins in newer Spring Security versions.
Update CORS registration paths to match Swagger UI 3 endpoints instead of Swagger 2.
Clean up unused imports resulting from the migration and code simplification.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import java.io.UnsupportedEncodingException; import java.util.*; import org.springframework.http.MediaType;
